description:
You are logged into OpenProject at http://localhost:8080 as admin (password: Admin1234!). You are a QA Analyst performing a critical defect triage session for the 'mobile-banking-app' project after a production incident.

Update the 'Fix transaction history pagination bug' (assigned to alice.johnson) by setting its priority to 'Immediate', changing its status to 'In progress', and adding the comment: 'PRODUCTION INCIDENT: Users cannot see transactions older than 90 days. Customer support tickets increasing. Escalated to P0. All hands on deck until resolved.' For the 'Security audit - JWT token expiration' (assigned to carol.williams), change the priority to 'High' and add the comment: 'Security vulnerability confirmed: JWT tokens persist after logout. Must be patched before next release. Adding to Sprint 1 security hardening scope.' 

Create a new 'Bug' work package in the 'mobile-banking-app' project with the subject 'Emergency: Token invalidation on user logout' assigned to carol.williams in 'Sprint 1 - Auth & Onboarding' with 'Urgent' priority and the description: 'Implement immediate token revocation when user logs out. Related to JWT security audit findings.' Additionally, create a wiki page in the 'mobile-banking-app' project titled 'Incident Report - Transaction History' documenting the production incident, including the bug description, customer impact, escalation timeline, assigned team members, and remediation steps.

metadata.new_bug_subject: Emergency: Token invalidation on user logout
